response.justification: Despite a broad and diverse engineering background, the candidate shows minimal evidence of direct experience with Java/Kotlin, JVM internals, Spring ecosystem, or enterprise IDE tooling — critical requirements for this role. Their work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile apps, with only incidental Java exposure in early roles without depth or ownership of JVM-based tooling.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across languages and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and tooling innovation
Proven ability to lead and teach through workshops and documentation
concerns: Lack of demonstrable deep JVM or enterprise Java/Kotlin expertise
No evidence of work on IDE internals, language servers, or build tool integration
Primary tech stack (TypeScript, DLang, Node.js) misaligned with core Java/Kotlin focus
